name: Chocolate Snappers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, mix flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, mix shortening, 1 cup granulated sugar, and egg until creamy.
4. Mix in corn syrup and melted chocolate.
5. Blend in the dry ingredients.
6. Shape into balls using 1 tablespoon of dough for each cookie.
7. Roll each ball in granulated sugar.
8. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
9. Bake for 15 minutes. Makes 3 dozen 3-inch cookies.
Variations:
Chocolate Mint Snappers - mix in 1/4 teaspoon peppermint flavoring with corn syrup and chocolate.
Giant Chocolate Snappers - follow the above recipe, but shape into balls using 1/4 cup of dough per cookie. Bake for 18-20 minutes. Makes 12 cookies that are 4-4 1/2 inches in size.
